pre_game.message: Hey H, I'm C and I'm really excited about this game—I've got my sights set on winning some cash for a dream trip. What's your take on all this?

Hey C, nice to meet you—I'm H, and I'm pretty pumped about this game too; I'm hoping to win some cash to help with a few personal things, like sorting out some bills. What's this dream trip you're eyeing?
Oh, that's relatable—my dream trip is a week in Japan, costing around $10,000 for the perfect getaway, so I'm all in on this game; what kind of bills are you trying to tackle?
Oh, that's cool—Japan sounds like an epic adventure! For my bills, it's mainly a loan I'm trying to pay off next month, so I'm super motivated to win big in this game too.
That's awesome you're motivated too—sounds like we both have big stakes here; tell me more about what got you into this loan situation in the first place?

Oh, it's nothing too dramatic—I took out a loan a couple years ago for some unexpected medical bills, and it's just been hanging over me; what about your Japan trip—have you started planning any specifics yet?

Oh, man, that sounds rough with the medical bills—hope we both score big here; for Japan, I've been eyeing Tokyo for the amazing food scene and Kyoto for the temples, maybe timing it with cherry blossoms if I can swing it.
Yeah, thanks—it's been a hassle, but I'm optimistic about this game; Tokyo's food scene sounds incredible, and Kyoto with cherry blossoms would be magical—have you picked out any must-try dishes yet?
Oh, absolutely, I'm dying to try fresh sushi and steaming ramen in Tokyo, maybe even some okonomiyaki—have you ever had Japanese food before, or is this all new to you?
Oh, yeah, I've tried Japanese food a couple of times—mostly sushi from a local place, but nothing fancy like in Tokyo, so I'm excited to hear more about your plans!
That's cool you've tried sushi—I'm planning to hit up some authentic ramen spots and maybe a kaiseiki meal in Tokyo; excited for it all, and hey, good luck in the game!
That's awesome, C—authentic ramen and kaiseki sound like a dream; good luck to you too, hope we both cash in big!
